A Service by HS108

CMF_Nexus

Product
Design

CAD CMF Prototype Production

From concept sketch to production-ready file. We blend design thinking with engineering rigour to develop products that look right, work right, and manufacture efficiently.

Timeline 8–20 weeks depending on complexity
Output Production-ready CAD + documentation

What We Do

Design that bridges
form and factory.

CMF_Nexus is HS108's product design practice. The name reflects the focus: Colour, Material, and Finish — the decisions that determine how a product feels, communicates, and holds up over time — brought together at the nexus of design and manufacture.

We work across the full product development cycle: from early ideation and form exploration through to detailed CAD, DFM review, and production-ready deliverables.

Our approach combines design intent with engineering discipline. A product should be desirable and buildable. Those aren't competing goals — they're the same goal, approached with enough rigour to get both right.

Deliverables

Concept & Ideation

  • Industrial design sketches
  • Concept exploration & selection
  • Ergonomics & human factors research
  • Form language development
  • Design intent documentation

Engineering Design

  • 3D CAD modelling (SolidWorks/Fusion)
  • CMF specification (colour, material, finish)
  • Design for manufacture (DFM) review
  • Tolerancing & assembly planning
  • Technical drawings & BOM support

Prototyping

  • Appearance models & soft mockups
  • Functional prototypes
  • User testing models
  • Pre-production samples
  • Production-ready design files

How We Work

01

Research

User needs, market context, manufacturing constraints — understanding all inputs before anything is drawn.

02

Concept

Rapid ideation across multiple directions. Wide before narrow — we explore before we commit.

03

Develop

CAD, CMF, DFM — the work of turning concept into something buildable, manufacturable, and right.

04

Deliver

Production-ready files, documentation, and manufacturing liaison support through to first article.

Start a CMF_Nexus project.

Tell us about the product you're building — what it needs to do, who it's for, and where in the development process you are. We'll work from there.

Get In Touch ← All Services

CMF_Nexus at a Glance

8–20 Weeks for full development cycle
3D CAD-ready files for manufacturing

Start a Project

Need the product to look as good as it works?

CMF_Nexus pairs with CX&Identity and Lumina.raw for full product launch coverage.
